trust_boundaries.name: Public Internet / Browser Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: The boundary between untrusted external actors (anonymous users, authenticated customers, attackers, B2B clients) and the Juice Shop application. All HTTP traffic crosses this boundary on port 3000.
trust_boundaries.enforcement: Express middleware stack (cors, helmet partial, express-jwt, rate-limit on subset). No network-layer perimeter control configured in source.

trust_boundaries.name: Browser / Angular SPA Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: The boundary between the browser DOM and the Angular SPA frontend. XSS payloads can cross this boundary and access localStorage JWT tokens.
trust_boundaries.enforcement: Angular DOM sanitization (partial); sanitize-html 1.4.2 (outdated, bypassable); helmet XSS filter disabled.

trust_boundaries.name: Application / Data Layer Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: The boundary between Express route handlers and the SQLite database / filesystem. In-process, with no network segment or DB-level access control.
trust_boundaries.enforcement: Sequelize ORM (bypassed via raw() in auth paths). No DB-level user permissions — single SQLite file with no auth.
weaknesses: raw SQL queries in login.ts and search.ts

trust_boundaries.name: Application / File System Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: The boundary between the Node.js process and the local filesystem containing user uploads, encryption keys, FTP files, and logs.
trust_boundaries.enforcement: Application-level path checks (keyServer checks for /); no OS-level mandatory access control. UID 65532 provides container-level isolation only.

trust_boundaries.name: B2B API JWT Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: The boundary enforcing machine-to-machine authentication for the B2B order API at /b2b/v2. JWT bearer token required, but private key is public.
trust_boundaries.enforcement: express-jwt isAuthorized() at server.ts:423. RS256 verification using publicKey — but private key is hardcoded in source at lib/insecurity.ts:23.
weaknesses: private key in source enables token forgery
notevil sandbox escapable via prototype pollution

trust_boundaries.name: Container / Host Boundary
trust_boundaries.description: Docker container boundary isolating the Node.js process from the host OS. Distroless image with UID 65532 provides strong isolation at the OS level.
trust_boundaries.enforcement: Docker container with distroless gcr.io/distroless/nodejs24-debian13 image, non-root UID 65532. No --privileged flag.
weaknesses: no cosign signing on release images
